underlying_goal: Configure Claude Code with best-practice settings, hooks, instructions, and agents for more deterministic and effective behavior in their dataplane project
friction_detail: Claude assumed which files to update without asking, prompting user to add an 'always ask, don't assume' rule.
brief_summary: User wanted to set up Claude Code best-practice configs (hooks, agents, CLAUDE.md rules) and iteratively refined them; all changes were implemented, committed, and pushed successfully.
